task_description: Fix PWA status bar, responsive layout, layout shift (CLS), animations/premium feel, and bottom nav tab switch lag across the Next.js grocery PWA

verification.summary: ESLint passes with zero errors. TypeScript type-check (tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck) passes with zero errors. Full build requires DATABASE_URL (Neon Postgres) not available in sandbox. No test files were added (no test infrastructure for UI components exists in this project).

issues_fixed: ThemeColorSync: querySelectorAll updates all meta[name=theme-color] tags
BottomSheet: sr-only Drawer.Title rendered when no title prop provided
MobileBottomNav: removed onTouchStart (scroll gesture issue), kept onMouseEnter only
globals.css: added specificity comment for tablet safe-area rule ordering
lib/motion.ts presets now imported and used in cart-page-client, mobile-bottom-nav, product-card
